Setlist
States DMB Has Played In
Here is a list of first and last show that Dave Matthews Band have been in each state. If Dave played in the state before the first or after the last full band shows, we've put that in the notes.

Updated through 9.20.2025
Order State First Show Venue & Location First Song Last Show Venue & Location Notes
